title: sir.ledger.v0
description: Append-only ledger entry. SIEM exporters and evidence consumers depend on this shape. The hash chain (prev_hash → hash) enables tamper detection.

case_id.description: Optional harness case identifier (present when decision originated from a harness run).

decision_id.description: Unique decision identifier (Go-stamped after Rust evaluation).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the decision.

mode.description: Protection mode active at decision time.

policy_rules.description: Native SIR policy rule IDs that triggered this verdict, in match order. External provider policy evidence is stored separately.

type.description: Effect kind: block, record, prompt, nudge, contain.

required.description: If true, absence of this effect provider fails closed.

fail_closed.description: If true, provider failure denies the action.

effects.description: Ordered list of effects planned for this decision.

enforceability.description: Whether the kernel can prevent (enforces), observe (detects), or is blind to the action in the active mode.

attribution.description: Attribution confidence at decision time. See sir.attribution.v0 for the full structured form.

action_type.description: Primary action type from normalized signals (e.g. shell_exec, file_read, network_connect).

sensitivity.description: Highest sensitivity label across signal targets.

base_verdict.description: Native verdict before advisory provider composition.

developer_workflow_floor.description: Human-readable evidence about whether the clean developer-workflow floor suppressed advisory escalation.

used.description: True when the provider verdict changed native allow into final ask.

provider_policy_evidence.description: Advisory policy-provider verdict evidence, separate from native policy rules.

provider_evidence.description: Provider invocation failures or disabled-provider evidence recorded fail-open.

explanation.description: Human-readable decision explanation. Not a parity field; Go-only.

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous ledger entry (hex). Empty string for the first entry.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this entry's canonical representation (hex).
